name: Whole Foods
notes: Store-specific page; sales section may be in embedded JSON rather than visible HTML.

name: Local Farmers Market
notes: Fetch the weekly or seasonal report page. Supplement with USDA terminal market PDFs at https://ams.usda.gov/mnreports/

name: The Fresh Market
notes: Use myweeklyads.net as the fallback; thefreshmarket.com requires store selection that doesn't work in a plain fetch.

name: Earth Fare
notes: Fetch the landing page first to extract the dynamic PDF URL — do not guess the PDF filename directly.
